text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Domestic Violence Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Human Trafficking Issues Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF PUEBLO UNIDO PDX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a navigation team that helps community members overcome financial, technological, linguistic, and literacy barriers to legal representation and social services. Eligibility: Individuals with vulnerable immigration status Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, closed federal holidays Email (503) 912-8925 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
